column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
Many prayers for Florida Hope all are safe
thank you

Just drove to work from South Riverview to Tampa. Windy, very little rain, roads look good. Didn’t see any standing water. Would not recommend taking the upper deck of the Crosstown due to the wind gusts 👀.
Where exactly is the Tornado warning? I'm in Zephyrhills and going to work in New Tampa
looks to be just East of Zephyrhills in the green swamp I think they call it
it was here in Lakeland
be safe!!! ♥️
I'm going to give it my best Lori. Same to you. I hope you don't have to go out. Kisses to Cooper. I hope what's his name stays safe too. LOL
please be careful out there
I promise. You too
Can I make it across the Howard Franklin from Tampa to south st Pete?
south bound is open, north bound Howard Franklin is closed. So yes, but getting home may be a different story. Depends on how the day goes.
yep I’ll have to leave by 3 to get home, so hopefully it’ll be open 🤞
I wouldn't get on there saw a video water was crashing on the road
hmmmm I will have to leave St Pete at 3, wondering if it’ll be worse or not
Still? I slept through most of it I thought. Better go look and see how my plants are.
I would not. A video was scary

their all probably saturated big time, mine too. I just sat my hanging baskets down out back into the ferns area so they didn't blow around. Now they need drying out big time! At least we don't need to water for awhile.
absolutely! Just checked and same situation here. They’re all flooded. Will get out in a bit to empty them and try to move them to the porch. Everything on the porch is still standing

I wonder if some of mine will end up dying ones outside so soaked. It's supposed to clear and sun tomorrow will put them all out hoping they dry out! My back porch is good but wet where the rain blew in. Auch a mess! Praying no more storms!
I was awakened by the phone warning at 6 am in north Lakeland. The wind was horrible. Prayers that everyone is ok. It is still quite gusty here.
Thank you for updating us. Still no power 😭 out by Dunedin.
How are the road? I have to go the work
Thank You for all your updates.
he has been a great source for sure 💫
Longest storm ever. I underestimated this little Debby!
literally so long. Feels like we waited forever for it to get here and now it just won't leave 😂😭
yess, totally underestimated her!
We are getting a down poor and crazy wind right now in Ruskin. I am about 4 miles from Sun City Center.
Denis Phillips when do you recall there being this many tornadoes with a storm/hurricane? I also don’t remember there being so much lightning with a storm/hurricane before?
I don’t remember lightning either.
Thank you for keeping us updated
Have there been any tornadoes? We have had multiple seek shelter warmings in Parrish.
Whats your prediction for amount of rain coverage in st pete today? To me the radar looks spotty but my apps are showing high percentage all day.
113th Seminole to East Bay was perfect
Day 2 of more water Debbie isn't little lol
We definitely heard something around 2 not going to lie I got scared being were in mobile home
I woke up to the sounds of crazy winds.
me too sounded like my.roof was going to come off... it was bone chilling.

same here
North Lakeland
where at?
belcher
North Lakeland but the wind is not so bad now

We're in a safe place my phone woke me up
Thank you for all the hard work and updates through this. Rural area and it's greatly appreciated

Thank you!
